title: Consolidate brand assets into packages/ui/brand + zero-config generator
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Consolidates all brand assets into `packages/ui`, and replaces the old per-app icon generator with one zero-config tool. Scoped to icons/assets — turnstile, `format-branch.sh`, and the rotation scripts are untouched.

**Brand kit** — `packages/ui/src/brand/` (exported as `@pollinations/ui/brand/*`)
- `mark` (pixel lotus), `wordmark` (`pollinations.ai`), `lockup-horizontal`, `lockup-stacked`
- each as a `currentColor` SVG master + fixed **ink `#110518`** / **white** in **SVG and PNG**
- lockups composed with `<g transform>` (robust to SVG optimizers), aligned by true ink bounds

**Polli mascot kit** — `packages/ui/src/brand/polli/` (PNG only, transparent)
- `polli.png` (full-colour bee) + horizontal/stacked lockups; bee stays full-colour, black/white applies to the wordmark

**Generator** — `packages/ui/scripts/brand/` (`npm run brand`, not shipped to npm)
- **zero config, no flags.** Rebuilds the committed kit in `src/brand` **idempotently** (zero churn), and writes every favicon / PWA / apple-touch / maskable / OG / social asset to `brand-out/` (gitignored) — copy into a site's `public/`
- everything derives from two atomic SVGs + the raster bee; recolour = swap `currentColor`, size/padding are data in `presets.js` (add a platform by adding a line)
- colours are the two brand themes from `theme-palette.json` — icons gold on transparent, OG/apple/maskable/social dark on cream — matching **enter.pollinations.ai 1:1** (mark, colours, layout, and padding verified against the committed assets)
- OG + fb-cover use the stacked two-line lockup (matches ig-post and enter's OG)

**Removed**
- The old per-app icon generator (`tools/icons/`) and root `assets/` folder — migrated into `packages/ui`

**Wiring**
- `@pollinations/ui/assets` → `@pollinations/ui/brand`; repointed `AuthModal`, `AppHeader`, enter `dashboard-shell` (+ its vite alias), gen `/docs` route, the apidocs generator, and both READMEs

`packages/ui` builds clean; `dist/brand/` (incl. `polli/`) populated. CodeQL/

gist.headline: Brand in a box
gist.blurb: We've packed all our brand assets and mascot files into a single, tidy UI package. Generating favicons and social images is now a zero-config breeze for the hive.
gist.summary: Consolidated all brand assets and the Polli mascot into `@pollinations/ui/brand` and replaced the old per-app icon generator with a centralized, zero-config tool.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate all required favicons, PWA icons, and social assets for new apps with a single `npm run brand` command.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing a neat box of pixel art logos, icons, and pictures. The robot companion holding up a freshly printed favicon.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, organizing glowing pixelated logos and icons into a neat wooden crate. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding up a freshly printed social media card. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
